activities: 1. SURGIFLOW-REGISTRY-001: Multi-centre observational study targeting 500 patients over 3 years (enrolment ongoing - 187 patients enrolled as of Dec 2023). 2. Annual systematic literature search. 3. Spontaneous data collection from clinical sites.
enrollment_recovery_plan: Enrolment target remains on track. Two additional sites activated in Q3 2023 to offset slower-than-expected recruitment at Site 003.
